author: Waldemar
description: Adds a command to replace the current tab with an empty page, the same screen shown when opening a new tab. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: waldemar-one
manifest.description: Adds a command to replace the current tab with an empty page, the same screen shown when opening a new tab.
manifest.name: Empty Tab

name: Empty Tab

releases.author: waldemar-one
releases.description:
Initial release.

Adds a single command, **Empty Tab: Empty current tab**, that replaces the active tab with Obsidian's built-in empty view, the same screen you see when opening a brand new tab.

Requires Obsidian 1.12.7 or later.

Not yet listed in Community Plugins. For manual install, download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and place them in `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/empty-tab/`.
